summary: Phase 3: Feed as Return Engine testing completed. All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend verification confirms all new components render correctly: PersonalAlertStrip with trending_opportunity alert and Compete CTA, War Banner showing 'The Starship Paradox' LIVE, TrendingPublicFeed with 4 cards and HOT badges, YourCreationsStrip with 4 creation cards. Existing story rows (continue_stories, trending_now, fresh_stories) still render - no regressions.

issues: 404 errors for some resources (likely missing images/assets) - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: PersonalAlertStrip.jsx (lines 11-158): Correctly fetches from /api/stories/notifications/battle and /api/war/current, prioritizes alerts by urgency (war_overtake=12, rank_drop=10, war_losing=9, outperformed=8, war_won=6, trending_opportunity=3), shows max 2 alerts with correct CTAs (Take Back Rank, Fight Back, Compete)

TrendingPublicFeed.jsx (lines 10-120): Correctly fetches from /api/stories/feed/discover?sort_by=trending, shows HOT badge when total_children>=3 or battle_score>50, displays creator_name, engagement metrics (views/continues/shares/score), and derivative attribution

YourCreationsStrip.jsx (lines 10-92): Correctly fetches from /api/story-engine/user-jobs, filters to READY/PARTIAL_READY/COMPLETED states using both state and status fields, shows rank and engagement metrics
Dashboard.js (lines 1000-1116): Correct section order - PersonalAlertStrip at top, then Hero, War Banner, Continue Watching, Trending Now, Your Creations, Leaderboard

story_multiplayer.py (lines 966-1104): /api/stories/notifications/battle returns unread battle notifications with correct types, /api/stories/feed/discover returns public stories with pagination and all required fields for TrendingPublicFeed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Feed as Return Engine is fully implemented and working. PersonalAlertStrip shows at top of /app homepage with alerts from battle notifications and war position. TrendingPublicFeed shows public stories from ALL users with HOT badges for high-engagement stories. YourCreationsStrip shows user's own stories with rank and engagement. War Banner shows active war 'The Starship Paradox'. All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented: personal-alert-strip, alert-{type}, trending-public-feed, trending-card-{i}, see-all-trending, your-creations-strip, your-creation-{i}, see-all-creations, war-banner. Backend endpoints: /api/stories/notifications/battle, /api/war/current, /api/stories/feed/discover, /api/story-engine/user-jobs, /api/stories/feed/continue-watching, /api/stories/feed/trending.

backend_tests_summary.TestBattleNotifications: 4 tests passed - endpoint exists, response structure, notification types, deep_link fields
backend_tests_summary.TestWarCurrent: 3 tests passed - endpoint exists, response structure with root_title, leaderboard data
backend_tests_summary.TestDiscoverFeed: 6 tests passed - endpoint exists, response structure, story fields, HOT badge criteria, attribution fields, pagination
backend_tests_summary.TestTrendingFeed: 2 tests passed - endpoint exists, sorted by battle_score
backend_tests_summary.TestUserJobs: 4 tests passed - endpoint exists, response structure, story fields with status, filterable states
backend_tests_summary.TestContinueWatchingFeed: 2 tests passed - endpoint exists, response structure
backend_tests_summary.TestWarNotifications: 2 tests passed - war_overtake type supported, CTA fields present
backend_tests_summary.TestHomepageSectionOrder: 1 test passed - all homepage endpoints accessible

frontend_verification.PersonalAlertStrip: Verified - Shows trending_opportunity alert 'The Crystal Maze — Horror Edition is exploding' with Compete CTA
frontend_verification.Hero Section: Verified - Shows 'The Painter of Stars' with FEATURED badge, Continue Story and Remix buttons
frontend_verification.War Banner: Verified - Shows 'DAILY STORY WAR LIVE - The Starship Paradox'
frontend_verification.TrendingPublicFeed: Verified - 4 trending cards with HOT badges
frontend_verification.Existing Rows: Verified - continue_stories, trending_now, fresh_stories rows still render (no regression)
